sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayIntersect(arr1, arr2, arr3) AS common_elements FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET arr1 = arrayConcat(arr1, [4]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayIntersect(arr1, arr2) AS intersected FROM test_arrays WHERE arr1[1] = 1;
